name: 3P Learning Limited..
analysis: 3PL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 54% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (112.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.2900. Trade idea: entry A$0.3250, stop A$0.2475, target A$0.3600 (0.45:1) — then trail it.
